title: Atherosperma novae-zelandiae

intro: Atherosperma novae-zelandiae, also known as the New Zealand tōtara or Atherosperma, is a plant species native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Atherospermataceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Māori medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
